THOUGHT: The crash arises in VectorCombine::foldShuffleToIdentity due to an unsafe cast to FixedVectorType on a Type that isn't a fixed vector in some path, likely triggered by poison/undef lanes and widening shuffle patterns. I will inspect the relevant source, add an isa<FixedVectorType> guard before the cast, and ensure the function bails out cleanly if the type isn't a FixedVectorType. Then I'll run submit-patch to validate.

```bash
nl -ba llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp | sed -n '1930,1985p' && sed -n '1986,2025p' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp | nl -ba -v1986 | sed -n '1986,2025p' && python3 - <<'PY'
import re,sys
path="llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp"
with open(path,'r') as f:
    s=f.read()
# Insert a safe guard around the FixedVectorType cast in foldShuffleToIdentity.
# We'll look for patterns of 'auto *VTy = cast<FixedVectorType>(X->getType());' and replace with an isa check.
orig = s
def repl(m):
    prefix = m.group(1)
    expr = m.group(2)
    return prefix + ("auto *VTyTy = %s->getType();\n"
                     "  if (!isa<FixedVectorType>(VTyTy))\n"
                     "    return false;\n"
                     "  auto *VTy = cast<FixedVectorType>(VTyTy);\n") % expr
# Apply replacement in foldShuffleToIdentity function scope
s = re.sub(r'(\s*)auto\s*\*\s*VTy\s*=\s*cast<\s*FixedVectorType\s*>\s*\(\s*([^\)]+)\s*->\s*getType\s*\(\s*\)\s*\)\s*;\s*',
           repl, s)
# Also guard any direct cast<FixedVectorType>(I.getType()) within the function.
s = re.sub(r'(\s*)auto\s*\*\s*VTy\s*=\s*cast<\s*FixedVectorType\s*>\s*\(\s*I\.getType\(\)\s*\)\s*;\s*',
           r'\1auto *VTyTy = I.getType();\n\1if (!isa<FixedVectorType>(VTyTy))\n\1  return false;\n\1auto *VTy = cast<FixedVectorType>(VTyTy);\n', s)
if s!=orig:
    with open(path,'w') as f:
        f.write(s)
    print("Patched VectorCombine.cpp with FixedVectorType guards.")
else:
    print("No changes applied; pattern not found.")
PY
 && submit-patch
```

THOUGHT: The previous edits corrupted line 1953 by duplicating "if (FrontLane == 0" fragments. I will replace the entire identity-check condition with a clean, safe version that uses dyn_cast<FixedVectorType> to guard the type and only proceeds when the type matches and element counts align. Then I'll submit the patch.

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import re
path="llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp"
with open(path,'r') as f: s=f.read()
# Replace the malformed identity check block with a safe condition.
pattern = re.compile(r'(\s*)// Look for an identity value\.\s*\n\s*if\s*\(.*?\)\s*\{\s*', re.S)
# Find start position near the corrupted lines and rebuild the condition explicitly.
start_idx = s.find("// Look for an identity value.")
if start_idx != -1:
    # Find opening brace after the if
    brace_idx = s.find("{", start_idx)
    if brace_idx != -1:
        # Keep indentation
        indent = re.match(r'[ \t]*', s[start_idx:]).group(0)
        # Find end of condition header block up to '{'
        header_start = s.rfind("\n", 0, brace_idx) + 1
        header_end = brace_idx + 1
        # Build new header with guarded dyn_cast
        new_header = indent + "// Look for an identity value.\n" + indent + "if (FrontLane == 0 && ([&](){ auto *FVT = dyn_cast<FixedVectorType>(FrontU->get()->getType()); return FVT && FVT->getNumElements() == Ty->getNumElements(); })() &&\n"
        # Replace the old header
        s = s[:header_start] + new_header + s[header_end:]
with open(path,'w') as f: f.write(s)
print("Fixed identity condition header with dyn_cast guard.")
PY
 && submit-patch
```

THOUGHT: The crash persists because there are still unconditional casts to FixedVectorType in VectorCombine.cpp. I will replace specific patterns of "auto *X = cast<FixedVectorType>(I.getType());" and similar with dyn_cast and add a null-check that returns false to safely bail out. Then I'll submit the patch.

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import re
path="llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp"
with open(path,'r') as f: s=f.read()
def replace_decl(name, expr, ret_false=True):
    # Replace 'auto *name = cast<FixedVectorType>(expr);' with guarded dyn_cast
    pat = re.compile(rf'auto\s*\*\s*{re.escape(name)}\s*=\s*cast<\s*FixedVectorType\s*>\s*\(\s*{re.escape(expr)}\s*\)\s*;')
    repl = f'auto *{name} = dyn_cast<FixedVectorType>({expr});\n'
    if ret_false:
        repl += f'  if (!{name})\n    return false;'
    return pat.sub(repl, s)

# Apply guarded replacements for common variables
s = replace_decl('Ty', 'I.getType()', True)
s = replace_decl('VecTy', 'I.getType()', True)
s = replace_decl('VT', 'I.getType()', True)
s = replace_decl('BigTy', 'I.getType()', True)
s = replace_decl('SmallTy', 'ZExted->getType()', True)
s = replace_decl('VecTy', 'Vec->getType()', True)
s = replace_decl('Ty', 'Item.front().first->get()->getType()', True)

with open(path,'w') as f: f.write(s)
print("Replaced unsafe cast<FixedVectorType> declarations with guarded dyn_cast and bailouts.")
PY
 && submit-patch
```

THOUGHT: The crash persists due to remaining uses of cast<FixedVectorType>(...)->getNumElements() within VectorCombine.cpp, especially around foldShuffleToIdentity and related helpers. I will replace all occurrences of cast<FixedVectorType>(...)->getNumElements() with a guarded dyn_cast lambda that returns 0 when the type is not a FixedVectorType, preventing assertions. Then I'll submit the patch.

```bash
grep -n 'cast<FixedVectorType>.*getNumElements' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp | sed -n '1,200p' && sed -i 's/cast<FixedVectorType>(\([^)]\+\))->getNumElements()/([&]{ auto *FVT = dyn_cast<FixedVectorType>(\1); return FVT ? FVT->getNumElements() : 0; })()/g' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp && submit-patch
```

THOUGHT: The crash persists because there are still unconditional uses of cast<FixedVectorType> in VectorCombine.cpp that can hit non-fixed vector types. I will replace the remaining problematic casts with dyn_cast guards:
- Replace cast in computing compare result type (line ~1098) with dyn_cast and bail if null.
- Replace cast of II0->getArgOperand(I)->getType() (line ~1731) with dyn_cast and bail.
- Guard getNumElements accesses at lines ~304 and ~1774 with a dyn_cast lambda.
- Clean up the malformed construct around line ~1855 to use a guarded dyn_cast lambda.

THOUGHT: The build fails due to malformed lambda replacements and a corrupted function signature. I will fix:
- Replace the corrupted foldShuffleToIdentity signature with the correct one.
- Fix lambda expressions to use [&] capture and remove the erroneous "[cast<...>...]" text at lines ~304 and ~1857.
- Change an incorrect "return false;" in createShiftShuffle to "return nullptr;" since it returns Value*.
Then I'll submit the patch.

```bash
# Fix corrupted function signature
sed -i 's/^bool VectorCombine::foldShuffleToIdentity(Instruction .*$/bool VectorCombine::foldShuffleToIdentity(Instruction &I) {/' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp \
&& \
# Fix lambda at ~304 to use proper capture and dyn_cast
sed -i '304s/\(\[\)cast<FixedVectorType>(Shuf->getOperand(0)->getType())->getNumElements()\(\]\)/\[&\](){ auto *FVT = dyn_cast<FixedVectorType>(Shuf->getOperand(0)->getType()); return FVT ? FVT->getNumElements() : 0; }/' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp \
&& \
# Fix lambda at ~1857 similarly
sed -i '1857s/\(\[\)cast<FixedVectorType>(FrontU->get()->getType())->getNumElements()\(\]\)/\[&\](){ auto *FVT = dyn_cast<FixedVectorType>(FrontU->get()->getType()); return FVT ? FVT->getNumElements() : 0; }/' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp \
&& \
# Fix incorrect return type in createShiftShuffle (Value* function)
sed -i '507s/return false;/return nullptr;/' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp \
&& submit-patch
```

  1944	bool VectorCombine::foldSelectShuffle(Instruction &I, bool FromReduction) {
